/usr/bin/clang++ -fPIC -g -shared -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/num_keypad.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libnum_keypad.so -o libnum_keypad.so CMakeFiles/num_keypad.dir/num_keypad_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/num_keypad.dir/num_keypad.cpp.o CMakeFiles/num_keypad.dir/num_keypad_autogen/EWIEGA46WW/qrc_num_keypad_resources.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
